scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w pos-web" "npm run dev -w pos-api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w pos-web && npm run build -w pos-api
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy -w pos-api && npm run deploy -w pos-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w pos-web && npm run typecheck -w pos-api && npm run typecheck -w @pos/shared
